home_bio: Class of 2003, Computer Science student at the University of Catania. I'm a programmer who thrives on challenges and problem-solving. I love getting my hands dirty with code, whether it's optimizing an SQL query, designing a logical user experience, or structuring a back-end. My current goal is to translate strong academic theory into clean code and practical solutions.
err_404_msg: It looks like you're lost in the file system. The requested route does not exist or has been moved.
err_403_msg: Access denied. You don't have the required permissions to view this resource.
err_500_msg: A critical server-side error occurred. The exception has been logged in the system records.
cookie_msg: I only use technical cookies to remember your language and theme preferences.
